"If we don't win the midterms... they'll find a reason to impeach me."- President Donald J. Trump
We're pleading you take this seriously. The Democrats are already moving to impeach the President and his Cabinet the SECOND they take control of the House.
House Democrats have announced Articles of Impeachment against your President, your Secretary of War Pete Hegseth, and your HHS Secretary RFK Jr. Their plans to sabotage the Trump Administration are already set in motion.
[That is... unless we take the President’s words to heart, defy history, and defeat the Democrats once and for all.](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=80a444c02e014ccbb8998f7f29c8d16f&_e=bCOIvmjAhiTRwq5uhIgvhpJsVQgCw7aVKAwbjSzjT7zGNQBaSZFLWfmD2sLa75VLJlReTBf9WvImNqZthoWfdtVNJSXTsaLhuuuqUXP-cLtPkfdjW4wCuKcqL4nufTqvjuB4JmqyfBirr2gDDrp-isN0a9gUlqT95szEjIeB0MymYSn3qzoKkXVIVfpX8NWWQzvseGpfXnMtzYXnj-UOKrljj-fK2nCe9kkfij72NoK1V6IEo9II9g55R_dbQ6YOR6Nw8hXtbZv95in73IS6xvpeNlYmu34GU_s3Myg9pqcwzzEFn0_dd-7Gv9OXssU5c3N63he6lhstU3P3qkdmaci0YbfRB35bRSzZSe09BEamK4QDdBoMn2Co9_8jZSpZ-RH3pTuMs536hTxczpc5CqWGoI0jePEpGnnvYXDYA5rzaZJu6ed2dH5HJlwNAKMVeLH5Ki7HtexioBGEQ0ajnZAETvpR9Fgwl21HIA85uqq9BCoizvX2rdqGwHCa2PZ3hB1D2JO2VipV1wXR9yhDCMzfUcntMYbQD-8VmqpJXIrTZ9fK8WOTaa_KxiQvzTwEBOEfdhV84CJ_LfsMEzZSiOVA6ClZoEZXmbVVT8ZSwBd6DoLJZ7MwPoHgcfJv8JaDViGirtEkKvQbTmgCAo8ZctwH_0ca8IKqUk7qvSvFEwxnoieF7AUlTQ4BlfbED4ggaG_XlOlMVjtVM7cHYC-jlsqEBJgt96FiN2DoNfdFRfg%3D)
The party in power has lost 20 out of 22 midterm elections, going back to FDR.
On top of that, the Democrats have raked in 300+ million dollars and the DCCC is targeting 35 seats to rip control away from House Republicans so they can impeach the President.
It's going to take a MONUMENTAL effort from every Conservative American to buck the norm and win big for Trump!
He just called Conservatives into action - is there anything you can contribute today? The amount you give isn't nearly as important as the number of folks who donate. We're officially deep into an election year so this is the single most important time to give!

clean_body: Major warning from the President (whatever you’re doing right now can wait) | Fellow Patriot - Whatever you're doing right now can wait. President Trump boils the importance of this year down into this one succinct sentence: "If we don't win the midterms... they'll find a reason to impeach me."- President Donald J. Trump We're pleading you take this seriously. The Democrats are already moving to impeach the President and his Cabinet the SECOND they take control of the House. House Democrats have announced Articles of Impeachment against your President, your Secretary of War Pete Hegseth, and your HHS Secretary RFK Jr. Their plans to sabotage the Trump Administration are already set in motion. The party in power has lost 20 out of 22 midterm elections, going back to FDR. On top of that, the Democrats have raked in 300+ million dollars and the DCCC is targeting 35 seats to rip control away from House Republicans so they can impeach the President. It's going to take a MONUMENTAL effort from every Conservative American to buck the norm and win big for Trump! He just called Conservatives into action - is there anything you can contribute today? The amount you give isn't nearly as important as the number of folks who donate. We're officially deep into an election year so this is the single most important time to give! | | | | Imagine the looks on their faces if the Democrats lose the midterms, and we expand our House Majority... And instead of launching an impeachment hoax, the House passes universal voter ID, more funding for ICE, citizenship requirements to vote, more election integrity measures, and further tax cuts. None of that is possible if we lose. You can make a historic impact by supporting our efforts to win, but you have to rise to the occasion today. Thanks for all you do, House Republicans MAJOR DEVELOPMENT MAGA Warriors Brooke Rollins and Pete Hegseth unveiled their plan to RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HEARTLAND from Communist China. FIRST: Chinese nationals bought up hundreds of thousands of acres of our land. THEN: Joe Biden filed LEGAL ACTION to let them purchase even more. NOW: Republicans are leading the way to take back our land! | | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. name: Fair Fight Action
subject: Three states where you can make an urgent difference to protect fair representation for Black and brown voters:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
What’s happening & how you can fight back: |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130820647/619028396/1793776944?refcode=emm_ffa_2026505_T1_CallaisMobz_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzY0MTIxNi1lMDQ4LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMSt-bi3kgya9Mty4xc_NzG66P-J36xb1TDhXaCyY2U=&emci=7b641216-e048-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=7c641216-e048-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=1037277)

| | Things are moving extremely quickly now. Far-right lawmakers across the South are rushing to rig new voting maps that erase representation for Black and brown Americans — just days after the Supreme Court — Roberts Court — gave them the green light. It’s a coordinated, region-wide power grab. It’s a blatant attempt to silence voters of color. And if it succeeds, it could lock in Republican control of Congress. **Alongside partners on the ground across the South, we’re now in a state-by-state struggle for fair elections with fair maps. Here are three key fights where you can help turn the tide:** _**Tennessee**_
_What’s happening:_ Tennessee’s governor was the first to call a special state legislative session in response to the Supreme Court ruling. They plan to eliminate a district that gave Black Tennesseans the chance to be fairly represented in Congress. _How you can fight back:_ Our partner, Civic TN, is organizing at the Capitol on Wednesday, May 6th and Thursday, May 7th. **[Sign up and get more info here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130820648/619028397/-1883456587?refcode=emm_ffa_2026505_T1_CallaisMobz_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzY0MTIxNi1lMDQ4LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMSt-bi3kgya9Mty4xc_NzG66P-J36xb1TDhXaCyY2U=&emci=7b641216-e048-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=7c641216-e048-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=1037277) ** _**Louisiana**_
_What’s happening:_ The governor moved to suspend an election that was already happening so lawmakers could redraw the voting maps — as soon as tomorrow — and eliminate the state’s two congressional districts that ensure fair representation for Black residents. _How you can fight back:_ The Louisiana legislature is holding a public hearing about the new maps this Friday. Our partner, Power Coalition, is organizing a series of virtual and in-person events this week. **[Check out their schedule here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130820649/619028398/-583408147?refcode=emm_ffa_2026505_T1_CallaisMobz_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzY0MTIxNi1lMDQ4LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMSt-bi3kgya9Mty4xc_NzG66P-J36xb1TDhXaCyY2U=&emci=7b641216-e048-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=7c641216-e048-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=1037277)** _**Alabama**_
_What’s happening:_ The governor called a special session following the Supreme Court ruling, giving lawmakers a chance to redistrict and with it, erase a district where Black voters have a fair chance to elect the candidate of their choice. _How you can fight back: _
1. Our partner, United Women of Color, is organizing a bus from North Alabama to Montgomery this Thursday, May 7th, when the legislature is meeting at the Capitol. **[Sign up here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130820650/619028399/167133809?refcode=emm_ffa_2026505_T1_CallaisMobz_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzY0MTIxNi1lMDQ4LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMSt-bi3kgya9Mty4xc_NzG66P-J36xb1TDhXaCyY2U=&emci=7b641216-e048-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=7c641216-e048-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=1037277) **
2. Our partners in this fight, Catalyst for Change, are hosting a webinar tomorrow, May 6th, to break down the Supreme Court ruling and what it means for Alabama. **[Sign up here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130820651/619028400/2040943903?os=ipad&refcode=emm_ffa_2026505_T1_CallaisMobz_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzY0MTIxNi1lMDQ4LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMSt-bi3kgya9Mty4xc_NzG66P-J36xb1TDhXaCyY2U=&emci=7b641216-e048-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=7c641216-e048-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=1037277#/registration)**

**Bottom line: We’re in a new phase of the fight for our democracy. Now’s the time for mass resistance. We’ll be in touch with more opportunities to take action in the places where you can make the greatest impact. And with your support, we’ll stay ready to defend the basic principle of fair elections with fair representation.** In solidarity, The Fair Fight Action Team
* * *

clean_body: What’s happening & how you can fight back: | | | Things are moving extremely quickly now. Far-right lawmakers across the South are rushing to rig new voting maps that erase representation for Black and brown Americans — just days after the Supreme Court — Roberts Court — gave them the green light. It’s a coordinated, region-wide power grab. It’s a blatant attempt to silence voters of color. And if it succeeds, it could lock in Republican control of Congress. Alongside partners on the ground across the South, we’re now in a state-by-state struggle for fair elections with fair maps. Here are three key fights where you can help turn the tide: Tennessee What’s happening: Tennessee’s governor was the first to call a special state legislative session in response to the Supreme Court ruling. They plan to eliminate a district that gave Black Tennesseans the chance to be fairly represented in Congress. How you can fight back: Our partner, Civic TN, is organizing at the Capitol on Wednesday, May 6th and Thursday, May 7th. Louisiana What’s happening: The governor moved to suspend an election that was already happening so lawmakers could redraw the voting maps — as soon as tomorrow — and eliminate the state’s two congressional districts that ensure fair representation for Black residents. How you can fight back: The Louisiana legislature is holding a public hearing about the new maps this Friday. Our partner, Power Coalition, is organizing a series of virtual and in-person events this week. Alabama What’s happening: The governor called a special session following the Supreme Court ruling, giving lawmakers a chance to redistrict and with it, erase a district where Black voters have a fair chance to elect the candidate of their choice. How you can fight back: 1. Our partner, United Women of Color, is organizing a bus from North Alabama to Montgomery this Thursday, May 7th, when the legislature is meeting at the Capitol. 2. Our partners in this fight, Catalyst for Change, are hosting a webinar tomorrow, May 6th, to break down the Supreme Court ruling and what it means for Alabama. Bottom line: We’re in a new phase of the fight for our democracy. Now’s the time for mass resistance. We’ll be in touch with more opportunities to take action in the places where you can make the greatest impact. And with your support, we’ll stay ready to defend the basic principle of fair elections with fair representation. In solidarity, The Fair Fight Action Team * | = = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2026 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Friend, The Trump administration is once again threatening elections across the country. Yesterday, Fulton County revealed that it had been served a federal grand jury subpoena for the names of its workers in the 2020 election. The threats and attacks on poll workers and elections officials are only increasing. An [Issue One analysis](http://links.votingrightsfund.org/s/c/XbbOCmZPp5eyH-bZHM6vt5w-3SlLCkXT0pUblqI6inf6t6bw-3Gsz6kIih1GgkcDK4nNdueVdTScs0hz1rLAlkmMKb1x_BA4vdOys6xHi0SSDiMbDQa5kEXfSVEbiiuxFi6_Kh_JiWVcqvOwkVKI3p-7PRxwD4s-iN9wAftcJwc8YH7jGksfcgYTpe5h6scedP5DA5jljZsTUfZT-1ptblJG0rgXkiM5FhWD_mPn3QowgMbqn9PdUelL1bQnlVtXz3N5kO0Q9Pf2W35UOEqt2sVWQ9LO8je7FxD9piv7FYMwOGFyJTTUuuxcf7rGRxVsb1fGW0nyjW0LNsxlPXSXM7v8kIxS7Df4lUFBw_-y-TQa2ospMMRVrN1CTULbSVZ6p44NPsSKL_mxB2ep1gNQbu06Av_pVuBzwq_s3_6huy3-y3VWXgxcHLN1vGDv_M2mD6nY/AO2zHqv-KAE9hqMRWsHrt-nBBy2dxI2F/20) from early this year revealed that turnover among election officials is sky-high, with threats of physical violence being a primary reason for leaving. This action by the Trump DOJ comes on the heels of the January ballot seizure and is a clear escalation in the Trump administration's efforts to attack election workers. [](http://links.votingrightsfund.org/s/c/qu2T4eTumF8Uh1MS5IKTRQCIW6D_1vBwThAyMRCvOq_E2kFMaSQHQ0HyyF0RFO_KFyRtQjSBE1CnC6h0XJ3mZSndfKG4EOZuIQly_80smWGc_ToQHkKdfNZBJUX0zbfFZt4AE56sotyFyCE2JznWf5blFhJ4lzN0QriKvzrafBeWGA6NwusthevMXKTjQX_9HZTN0vhJ993DDSwvm-SPeGmexauRZVgTitqvGFGJhXysL_4eOpFgC3bZ8ovxjxN38N5dy3M50eo3jDQmgFlIXniwghE5RxngK7dldioD0ml6UQ0zlACN9hsuIL66hMX7fLO-HidSuocmgMHU-_yViiRxrrMjhqvAVkSVcxyf4rtPw5tvIzAN_ySwGfzrJcFjQGaGVCsx8nkQ9PP72WnKbNPMDqSqVoQ5lBn2CS7pbQGyRUGjtKfQcwaP7zv7oL48zUdUgyWPx03nwTOxbqN3onAl9nweqWZxW9TNhdaWD3wFyJkJUstOF2jfdqCRuYykwupivStYxFSqtlJQttZm5iq05Rxzifvtj_7Y-8IgoiXkdEl1sTTLPFUymJP6GaflZe6puh1ZG_nPPdgrCyB8rMMNLYj8HW3E0umBiXVKDFyLf0dUiOXC0ExOo2GtRjHur_k8HqXmV4WS2oamh4TWpCweIxBW35i8q0cDRo_7gMxareZtABTNPih9kcw5TL-FfY8l29DDQAbXdO83kRtw4TX1pAparcV8SlEvHk2-ytvQ7MZdvyvbT7nWFvjntwm2M_m_7v63RyvGMv7xYiHDdDjQwNO3A8VnJputbdGQBSQKalJ_NdVCW4ragLRNpjWYlEnSU9pMvjvadIABF_OTdCQaiGED_b8tfnQuxV-1jMXFGmfK1Kf4HX-QHQFaKPUYVPF5CqwIIP47KbNiZgOZQ3g/2aH7tpbd43GJuWYHjFXikTLbKswANmzr/20) VRF stands with Fulton County Commissioner Robb Pitts, who on Monday said: **“This is yet another act of outrageous federal overreach designed to intimidate and to chill participation in elections.”** And this morning, the Supreme Court moved up its ruling on the Voting Rights Act to take effect immediately, allowing Louisiana to racially gerrymander its districts ahead of the midterm elections. Governor Jeff Landry declared an emergency and delayed the primaries, only 11 days away, to implement the new map. Early voting, including absentee ballots for overseas and military, has already started and will need to be discarded. Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson claimed that this ruling “has spawned chaos in the State of Louisiana." Changing the rules this close to the election is nothing short of utter recklessness by the state. Regardless of the new maps' fairness or the wisdom behind dismantling the VRA to allow its existence, suspending the primary elections when ballots have already been submitted to allow a last-minute change is dangerously irresponsible partisan foolery that undermines our basic democratic principles and will only result in chaos and stupidity. **If we don’t act now, these tactics will shape who gets to vote before a single ballot is cast.** VRF supports elected officials across the country who stand up to intimidation and bullying, just like Robb Pitt did. **[Chip in $10 today to help Voting clean_body: | | | Friend, The Trump administration is once again threatening elections across the country. Yesterday, Fulton County revealed that it had been served a federal grand jury subpoena for the names of its workers in the 2020 election. The threats and attacks on poll workers and elections officials are only increasing. An from early this year revealed that turnover among election officials is sky-high, with threats of physical violence being a primary reason for leaving. This action by the Trump DOJ comes on the heels of the January ballot seizure and is a clear escalation in the Trump administration's efforts to attack election workers. VRF stands with Fulton County Commissioner Robb Pitts, who on Monday said: “This is yet another act of outrageous federal overreach designed to intimidate and to chill participation in elections.” And this morning, the Supreme Court moved up its ruling on the Voting Rights Act to take effect immediately, allowing Louisiana to racially gerrymander its districts ahead of the midterm elections. Governor Jeff Landry declared an emergency and delayed the primaries, only 11 days away, to implement the new map. Early voting, including absentee ballots for overseas and military, has already started and will need to be discarded. Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson claimed that this ruling “has spawned chaos in the State of Louisiana." Changing the rules this close to the election is nothing short of utter recklessness by the state. Regardless of the new maps' fairness or the wisdom behind dismantling the VRA to allow its existence, suspending the primary elections when ballots have already been submitted to allow a last-minute change is dangerously irresponsible partisan foolery that undermines our basic democratic principles and will only result in chaos and stupidity. If we don’t act now, these tactics will shape who gets to vote before a single ballot is cast. VRF supports elected officials across the country who stand up to intimidation and bullying, just like Robb Pitt did. Every dollar goes directly to defending our elections at a moment when it matters most. —Daniel Weiss Executive Director Voting Rights Fund | Voting Rights Fund wasn’t created just to defend voting rights — we elect the leaders who will expand and protect them. Our aim is to keep our operational costs as low as possible, so a majority of our funds go toward doing the work that needs to be done. That means building a national bench of lawmakers who will fight tooth and nail to expand access to the ballot box and protect our right to vote at every level of government. Learn more about how to join our pro-democracy movement »** Paid for by Voting Rights Fund and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

name: Letlow for Louisiana
subject: BOMBSHELL: FLEMING CONFESSES HE IS STILL ON DC LOBBYING FIRM PAYROLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julia Letlow for Louisiana
body:
Fleming is cashing checks from a DC lobbying firm while holding statewide office

| | |
---
| | | | [|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/yWvzl72Accv?e=95355a072c&c2id=cd64ea42b1b0eeac0fd7d107db75288a)
| | | | | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** May 5, 2026[katherine@julialetlow.com](mailto:katherine@julialetlow.com)
**BOMBSHELL: FLEMING CONFESSES HE IS STILL ON DC LOBBYING FIRM PAYROLL** _Fleming is cashing checks from a DC lobbying firm while holding statewide office_**BATON ROUGE, LA** — During today’s debate, John Fleming said it’s [“perfectly ok”](https://us.list-manage.com/X7rNKUARUpJ?e=95355a072c&c2id=cd64ea42b1b0eeac0fd7d107db75288a) that he is an active employee of The McKeon Group, a Washington DC lobbying firm, while serving as Louisiana State Treasurer and running for the United States Senate.Fleming’s U.S. Senate [financial disclosure](https://us.list-manage.com/_tNMhEfvPrQ?e=95355a072c&c2id=cd64ea42b1b0eeac0fd7d107db75288a), filed under penalty of perjury, lists $41,500 in salary from The McKeon Group, Inc. and $120,217 in salary from the State of Louisiana. The same disclosure lists Fleming’s role with McKeon Group as continuing from January 2024 to present, identifying him as an Advisor while also listing him as Louisiana State Treasurer during the same period.McKeon Group’s [own website](https://us.list-manage.com/18pgFiwIOay?e=95355a072c&c2id=cd64ea42b1b0eeac0fd7d107db75288a) also lists Fleming as an employee. The firm has publicly described itself as a consulting and lobbying firm with Capitol Hill expertise._“John Fleming admitted today that he is still employed by a DC lobbying firm while serving as Louisiana State Treasurer,”_**said Letlow Communications Director Katherine Thordahl.** “ _That is a serious breach of trust that Fleming did not disclose to the voters while running for office.”_ Fleming’s disclosure also identifies a McKeon Group client, Cyber Innovation Center, and describes Fleming’s duties as “consulting and advising on federal funding for national defense projects.”**Fleming should immediately answer the following questions:**
* Did Fleming receive a formal advisory opinion from the Louisiana Board of Ethics approving his continued paid employment with The McKeon Group?
* Did Fleming perform McKeon Group work during state business hours or use any taxpayer-funded resources for firm business?
* Has Fleming used his title, relationships, or access as State Treasurer to benefit The McKeon Group, its clients, or prospective clients?
* Has The McKeon Group used Fleming’s title as Louisiana State Treasurer in pitches, client conversations, business development materials, or federal funding discussions?
* Has Fleming taken any official action as State Treasurer involving an entity that was also a McKeon Group client, prospective client, affiliate, contractor, or partner?
* Is any portion of Fleming’s compensation tied to federal funding, client success, lobbying outcomes, business development, or client retention?
* Will Fleming release his full contract with The McKeon Group, all payment records, all client assignments, and all ethics correspondence related to his outside employment?

Learn more at [JuliaLetlow.com](https://us.list-manage.com/12G64QvQVOv?e=95355a072c&c2id=cd64ea42b1b0eeac0fd7d107db75288a).
###

body:

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Peter, let’s have a quick chat, just me and you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
After that, you can go on with your day!
| Peter, can we have a quick chat? I promise it'll be brief.

I need your attention for just two minutes. After that, you can go on with your day:
Last month was an absolute disaster. I watched as our fundraising apparatus collapsed right in front of me. We set out to raise $1,000,000 and came up $250,000 short.
I'm left trying to pick up the pieces and rebuild but I need your help.
Here's the situation:
I just told my team I'd personally reach out to the top 10,000 Conservatives I know and ask for $25 to make up the gap.

clean_body: After that, you can go on with your day! | Peter, can we have a quick chat? I promise it'll be brief. I need your attention for just two minutes. After that, you can go on with your day: Last month was an absolute disaster. I watched as our fundraising apparatus collapsed right in front of me. We set out to raise $1,000,000 and came up $250,000 short. I'm left trying to pick up the pieces and rebuild but I need your help. Here's the situation: I just told my team I'd personally reach out to the top 10,000 Conservatives I know and ask for $25 to make up the gap. | we can recruit an army of grassroots volunteers and deploy doorknockers in key battleground states... we can go on offense in every competitive race, expand our early voter contact budgets, and reach more on-the-fence voters in purple districts... we can have the resources to invest more in our get-out-the-vote operations and maximize our chances of saving our Pro-Trump House Majority... # FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism -- mostly the latter -- and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today 's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.
---
[ **Join the Sun for 1¢ →** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=54fef9be615540499b5f5e4dff6b7d81&_e=nHEFYvqlkT6g5I6NzZvjqHcGCg6__buloJzdGYf7eAA-vK2eJNWRsoQ1urCS8QLMllxFWF6sPCJyd2aK1Y0cCnuG57H7ntlLqHa3N-SgoaqouPW79YgIs_2zv-IPIUUmjvuWYfb_9xQQBv6u1AkIq_91dTM7FsJHVBkZWaazDES7rWYcxyNcVNRGMh1eguDBUJwTvbhZJg785nAhORJ2UNsYe9DLEnuOoPRjcoMP5N-gj7Plo5HPARjQLavQgoHnQWj7ObICTJlUDEOp4Kk_5uZnK1R9_v3iEhyDqoaJ0DhxABfHpUPaDUuNPKumL-CIXWTyRkz8udetNgahKp4-N7kPvWC_kIdr5nfCm_579-ix_GTTLlS-jfktQzxyxomk49KGiZzSvlXb9dzx00XunuqlafNSwKGQaJ2AvWdyK0JfxNRa5qfVoDIHjJVc18TXvj4xWRyUA5FI4BmDMJRaYVT8OTeboIDEtbR9WjHrwm8%3D)
---
Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun 's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

In today 's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun 's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: They tried to take Trump out again
body:
Plus: Iran's regime is cracking | New episode for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/11ilCGYloBx?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
| | | | | |
Three weeks until New Mexicans pick a Republican nominee for governor. The new [Albuquerque Journal poll just dropped](https://us.list-manage.com/lNStxSCAb06?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e) — and it tells you everything about how wide open this thing still is.

Then we get to Iran. The regime is cracking. And what the Wall Street Journal just reported that they're considering...well, you have to hear it to believe it!
---
[|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/qZgjoFgxT_I?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
| |
🏛️ **HULL LEADS AT 30% — 40% STILL HAVEN'T DECIDED**
Gregg Hull is in front. Doug Turner is at 21%. Duke Rodriguez is stuck in single digits.
But the number that actually matters is 40% — that's how many Republican and Independent voters still haven't picked a candidate. Three weeks out.
We break down why nobody has been able to lay a glove on Hull, and the one move Doug Turner has to make in the next 14 days — or this race is over.

🔥 **THE ATTACK MAILERS HIT — AND ONE OF THEM ACTUALLY LANDS**
Duke Rodriguez voted in Arizona in 2024. And 2022. And 2018. And 2016.
A PAC mailer just made sure every Republican primary voter knows it.
Meanwhile, Duke's people are firing back at Doug Turner over $6 million in state contracts Turner's firm allegedly took from Michelle Lujan Grisham to push her COVID agenda.
We watch both candidates' ads on the show. One is professional. The other looks — well, you'll see. And we tell you which attack insiders say is actually working.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://us.list-manage.com/q7VRkLrTl3V?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
---
| |
🐬 **IRAN'S REGIME IS CRACKING — AND THEY'RE PLOTTING KAMIKAZE DOLPHINS**
70% inflation. Hundreds of millions in losses every day. No oil moving to China. The Iranian regime is desperate.
How desperate? The Wall Street Journal just reported they're contemplating strapping mines to dolphins to go after U.S. ships.
That's not a joke. That's actually being floated.
Mark walks through why Trump's blockade is working better than the media wants to admit — and why Scott Jennings completely lost his cool on CNN this week. We're not defending Jennings. But you have to see what triggered it.

✈️ **WARREN AND BUTTIGIEG JUST TOOK DOWN SPIRIT AIRLINES**
Spirit went bankrupt Saturday. 30 regional airports lost service overnight.
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent named names on Sunday morning TV: Elizabeth Warren wrote the letter that blocked the JetBlue merger. Pete Buttigieg's DOT killed the deal.
Why does it matter to you in Albuquerque? Half the Sunport's traffic flies Southwest. And when Spirit's discount flyers disappear from connecting hubs, your fares are about to go up across the board. Mark explains exactly how this hits your wallet.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://us.list-manage.com/30akolUiyec?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
---
| |

PLUS: A Hollywood reality star is running for LA Mayor against Karen Bass — and his ad, filmed standing in an Airstream parked on his burned-out home, is one of the most effective candidate spots we've seen all year. We also break down the new study showing millennial dads have **tripled** the time they spend with their kids since the 1960s.
---
|
---
| | ✅ **Watch** on[ YouTube](https://us.list-manage.com/uPqtmObCUYc?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)

✅ **SUBSCRIBE** to [our channel](https://us.list-manage.com/h2QqS1cpVSQ?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e) and hit the 🔔 for updates

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://us.list-manage.com/1BoOPyG9qEB?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)

✅ **DONATE** to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://us.list-manage.com/4hlcxidkY2S?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)

Thank you for being part of this community — real talk, real issues, and no spin.

**Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **
_No Doubt About It Podcast 🎙️_

body:

With Trump inching CLOSER towards becoming a dictator every day and his MAGA cronies wreaking HAVOC at every turn, we have a **huge** opportunity to flip the House and END his dangerous trifecta.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Thank you Sacramento Bee!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter, I’m proud to announce that I’ve earned the endorsement of _The Sacramento Bee_.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130820997/619043425/-330116832?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_MT_20260505_FR_BeeEndorsement_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDkyZGFmMy1lMzQ4LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CDexAF-KZjMjYI86seoi9jj0QnyalOU_qFw-aidMiGI=)
I don’t take this for granted. The Bee’s editorial board diligently researches and interviews the candidates before deciding on which to endorse. They cited my effective leadership, my commitment to protecting our democracy, my understanding of the issues facing our district, and my work to champion policies that uplift working families over the interests of billionaires.

We’re less than 30 days away from the California primary on June 2. Let’s keep up this momentum as we close in on election day. **_[Chip in $10 so I can keep fighting for our district, state, and country as a whole.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130820998/619043426/-330116832?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_MT_20260505_FR_BeeEndorsement_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDkyZGFmMy1lMzQ4LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CDexAF-KZjMjYI86seoi9jj0QnyalOU_qFw-aidMiGI=)_**
| [Chip in $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130820999/619043427/-330116832?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_MT_20260505_FR_BeeEndorsement_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDkyZGFmMy1lMzQ4LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CDexAF-KZjMjYI86seoi9jj0QnyalOU_qFw-aidMiGI=)
---

As I said before, the backbone of my career has been fighting for our area, the district I grew up in. Good air quality, safe neighborhoods, opportunities for families and kids. I won’t stop this fight now, and I’m proud to lead the way as Democrats take back the House this fall.

After the Trump Administration’s continued attacks on our democracy, _The Sacramento Bee_ recognizes that we need someone strong with experience who can lead the charge to fight back, and I will continue to be that someone.

As we round out this spring and head into the primary, we need to make sure that our grassroots support can keep up with my ultra-wealthy San Francisco venture capitalist opponent. **_[Donate $10 or anything you can so I can continue to lead this fight in Congress. I will never stop standing up to this administration.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130821000/619043428/-330116832?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_MT_20260505_FR_BeeEndorsement_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDkyZGFmMy1lMzQ4LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CDexAF-KZjMjYI86seoi9jj0QnyalOU_qFw-aidMiGI=)_**

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: the reality we’re facing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
The Republican Party is propped up by a network of billionaires and special interest groups who can write massive checks without giving it a second thought. Democrats are doing things differently.
#
Peter,
Across the country right now, there are incredible Democratic candidates running for office – up and down the entire ballot, in every single state.
They’ve got organizers knocking on doors. Volunteers making calls. These candidates are tirelessly showing up for their communities day after day.
The energy is there. The people are there.
**Money is the factor that is too often missing.**
**[ELECT DEMOCRATS: CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103464?refcode=em20260505-10390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10390%2E614464%2EFZbpsZ)**
Here's the reality we’re facing right now: **The Republican Party is propped up by a network of billionaires and special interest groups who can write massive checks without giving it a second thought.** Dark money flows freely – funding attack ads, voter suppression efforts, and GOP candidates who answer to their donors instead of the people they were elected to serve.
**Democrats are doing things differently.** Our power comes from real people like you – grassroots donors who give what they can, when they can, because they believe that our country can do better than it’s doing right now.
And that matters enormously. But it also means we face hard choices.
**Right now, we’re working to support Democratic candidates in all 50 states.**
We all know there is no shortage of fights worth having – and no shortage of dedicated leaders who are ready to have them. But without adequate resources, we are forced to make impossible decisions about where to invest, which races to prioritize, and which communities we simply cannot reach.
**Every state matters. Every election matters. Every constituent matters.**
**[ELECT DEMOCRATS: CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103464?refcode=em20260505-10390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10390%2E614464%2EFZbpsZ)**
We know what happens when Democrats show up everywhere: We win.
And we know what happens when we give up ground: Republicans entrench themselves for decades, gerrymander maps, restrict voting rights, and make it harder to fight back the next time. _We cannot afford to let that happen._
**If you've been waiting for the right moment to give – this is it.** Your donation today helps us support good candidates running in red and purple states across the country – where the odds are long but the stakes are even higher.
**[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us show up everywhere and WIN in 2026, Peter?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103464?refcode=em20260505-10390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10390%2E614464%2EFZbpsZ)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103465?refcode=em20260505-10390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=10390%2E614464%2EFZbpsZ) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103465?refcode=em20260505-10390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=10390%2E614464%2EFZbpsZ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103465?refcode=em20260505-10390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=10390%2E614464%2EFZbpsZ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103465?refcode=em20260505-10390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=10390%2E614464%2EFZbpsZ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103465?refcode=em20260505-10390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=10390%2E614464%2EFZbpsZ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103465?refcode=em20260505-10390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=10390%2E614464%2EFZbpsZ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103464?refcode=em20260505-10390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=10390%2E614464%2EFZbpsZ)
---
No billionaire is going to fund this fight. It's up to us – all of us – together.
Thank you for being part of this.
– SDC HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdc-email-footer?refcode=em20260505-10390-footer&t=11&refcode2=10390_614464_FZbpsZ&akid=10390%2E614464%2EFZbpsZ)**
---

As Trump and Republicans escalate attacks on mail-in voting and push voter suppression efforts across the country, we’re fighting back by working to enshrine access to mail-in voting in Arizona’s state constitution.
Arizona is on the front line of the national fight for voting rights, and what happens here will shape the country.
**We’re not going down without a fight — that’s not the Arizona way.**
[**My friends and I are kicking off the Protect the Vote campaign tomorrow night, and I hope to see you there. subject: You up?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
|

_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2196%2E259176%2ERHI2YT) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2196%2E259176%2ERHI2YT)_

I’ve been up since the crack of dawn, but I can’t sleep. We are just a couple days away from our weekly fundraising deadline, and my team and I set a bold goal of raising $100,000 every week until the primary. We absolutely cannot afford to fall short in a race like this if we want to take back the House for Democrats. So I’m really counting on supporters like you to help make this happen. [**If you’re able to split a contribution between me and Blue Amp Action to power this grassroots campaign, even if it’s only $1, that would mean the world to me.**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10889?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.05_Dunn-You-Up_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=5&akid=2196%2E259176%2ERHI2YT) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Harry Dunn and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10 >>](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10890?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.05_Dunn-You-Up_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=6&akid=2196%2E259176%2ERHI2YT)

name: Team Cooper (via Cooper Victory Fund)
subject: Don’t sleep on this anti-voter attack
body:
Millions of North Carolinians could be disenfranchised
| | Peter,
---
Sorry to email so late, but we’re still a few thousand signatures short on Roy Cooper’s emergency petition in defense of voting rights in light of the Supreme Court’s disastrous ruling. **[Can you please take 60 seconds now to add your name?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/voting-rights-0526?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=email_su_pros_jtk418&t=6&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)**
Roy refuses to stand on the sidelines while a few far-right extremists try to send us back to the days of widespread voter suppression across the South – **so Peter, neither can you.**
**[It’s going to take a massive grassroots mobilization to ensure our democracy’s survival, and we're counting on 150 more signatures from Englewood. Please join us in the fight by signing the petition without further delay.](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/voting-rights-0526?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=email_su_pros_jtk418&t=7&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/voting-rights-0526?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=email_su_pros_jtk418&t=8&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)
---
Thank you for taking a stand with us – on the right side of history.
– Team Cooper
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **RoyCooper.com (via Cooper Victory Fund)**
Date: Mon, May 4, 2026
Subject: Emergency Action: Safeguard fair representation and voting rights
| | [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=9&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd) |
---
[](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/voting-rights-0526?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=email_su_pros_jtk418&t=10&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)
Peter – the President Trump-stacked Supreme Court just gutted Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, which bans racially discriminatory electoral laws and maps.
**_[If that’s all you need to hear, please take 60 seconds right now to sign on to Roy’s emergency petition in support of fair representation and voting rights before 11:59 p.m.](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/voting-rights-0526?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=email_su_pros_jtk418&t=11&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)_**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/voting-rights-0526?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=email_su_pros_jtk418&t=12&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)
---
**By effectively empowering GOP-held state legislatures to silence millions of voters of color – _and millions of North Carolinians_ – ahead of the midterms, the _Louisiana v. Callais_ ruling is an egregious attack on the better part of a century’s worth of progress. It also risks giving MAGA Republicans all the seats they need to lock in control of the House for decades to come.**
The Supreme Court has joined President Trump and his congressional allies in chipping away at the very idea that in our democracy, every vote matters equally.

However, this appalling decision only underscores what Roy has said before: **Democracy is not something guaranteed to us – it’s something we must fight for.**
**_[That’s why we’re counting on at least 50,000 folks like you to join the fight alongside him in support of fair representation and voting rights ASAP. Will you please take 60 seconds now to add your name to our emergency petition before the deadline at midnight?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/voting-rights-0526?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=email_su_pros_jtk418&t=13&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)_**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/voting-rights-0526?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=email_su_pros_jtk418&t=14&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)
---
We can’t afford to go back.

– Team Cooper
| |
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=1&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6297?source=&t=2&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)
---
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6298?source=&t=3&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)
---
| | [SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=4&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)
---
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=15&akid=1290%2E124072%2E-9W7Fd)

name: Nancy Lacore
subject: I’m concerned about Pete Hegseth.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
Hi there, it’s Nancy Lacore, the Democrat running to flip South Carolina’s First District.
I have a lot of thoughts about what’s been going on with Pete Hegseth.
Not only did he remove me from my position as Chief of the Navy Reserve after 35 years of service, but he’s actively undermining the foundation of our military.
Hegseth has fired more than a dozen senior military officers, including an Army chief of staff and two other generals who were ousted recently.
And now, he’s waging a war with Iran that could put our national security and countless American lives on the line.
That kind of behavior isn’t just destabilizing – it’s dangerous.
Now more than ever, we need leadership that’s rooted in honor, service, and respect. And that’s exactly why I’m running for Congress in South Carolina’s First District.
If we’re going to flip this seat and take back a Democratic House Majority, I need your help. Can you make a split donation of $25 or whatever you can, to Resist Reclaim Rebuild and my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
DONATE NOW TO HELP NANCY FLIP THIS SEAT! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
I’ll be honest, folks, I’m concerned.
While global tensions rise, the last thing we need is reckless leadership that’s willing to gamble with American lives.
We need steady, experienced leaders who are focused on delivering results – not inciting chaos, playing political games, and putting their own interests above the nation’s.
And I’m running for Congress to restore that kind of leadership – but we have a long road ahead of us to flip this seat and restore some accountability to Washington.
This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and it could decide control of the House. So I need all hands on deck to win. So I have to humbly ask: Will you split $25 today to support Resist Reclaim Rebuild and my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
CHIP IN TO DEFEAT MAGA! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
With my deepest respect and gratitude,
RADM Nancy Lacore
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
Resist Reclaim Rebuild is an organization committed to helping Democrats win up and down the ballot, nationwide.
PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW.RESISTRECLAIMREBUILD.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE COMMITTEE.
Resist Reclaim Rebuild
1331 FLORIDA AVE NW
Washington, DC 20009
United States

name: Flip the Senate
subject: According to the NYT, we can win the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www

subject: The Epstein class is making up lies to attack me.

body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
FIRST: I spearheaded the Epstein Files Transparency Act that exposed many of the most powerful tech barons, real estate moguls, and politicians.
NOW: The Epstein class is trying to intimidate me. They’re making up lies and trying to get me to back down.
They know I can’t be bought—and that terrifies them.
Will you rush a donation of $5 or more to show that these attacks by the Epstein class won’t work? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-fund?refcode=20260505&amount=5]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-fund?refcode=20260505]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-fund?refcode=20260505 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-fund?refcode=20260505]
I don’t take PAC money. I don’t take lobbyist money. I don’t take corporate money.
My campaign is powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you.
That’s why I need to ask—will you show me you have my back by donating $5 or more today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-fund?refcode=20260505&amount=5]
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-fund?refcode=20260505&amount=5]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-fund?refcode=20260505]
Thank you for your support, your activism, and all that you do.
Onward,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130821771/619068145/1254288483?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjVmOTViNGYtZjI0OC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sieqjX4obQOLxeQZ1jgnsfJHaGbcxIbktyulUDBTtsM=) Friend,

We are exactly one month – four more Tuesdays – before our critical primary Election Day.

**With ballots having been mailed out across our district, our race is officially on.**

Our campaign has been fortunate to earn the support of a large swath of public servants and notable organizations, but with ballots in the hands of voters, we have to ramp-up our most important direct outreach between now and the June 2 election.

[**Will you pitch in $3 today to help our get-out-the-vote operations ahead of the primary Election Day? Every dollar means another contact!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130821772/619068146/1254288483?refcode=em-5.5.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjVmOTViNGYtZjI0OC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sieqjX4obQOLxeQZ1jgnsfJHaGbcxIbktyulUDBTtsM=)

Last cycle, we elected the first progressive woman to represent CA-30, and people like YOU made this possible. But every remaining undecided voter can make a difference.

That will take significant effort and resources, and that means we have to work harder than special-interest funded candidates to reach voters.

[**Any amount you can give today will have an outsized impact on our canvassing efforts ahead of June 2. Will you help us continue to grow our community support between now and Election Day?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130821774/619068148/1254288483?refcode=em-5.5.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjVmOTViNGYtZjI0OC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sieqjX4obQOLxeQZ1jgnsfJHaGbcxIbktyulUDBTtsM=)

We’re stronger because of you.

Laura

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m officially the Democratic Nominee for U.S. Senate in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I’ll always have your back. Can you have mine tonight?
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260505_2.r05bMU&refcode=em20260505-2&t=1&akid=6481%2E582294%2ErJGZ8z)
I want you to be the first to see this: **I’m officially facing off against Jon Husted for Ohio’s Senate seat.**
So much hard work has brought us to this point, and I’m beyond grateful to everyone who has devoted their time, energy, and dollars to support my campaign so far. Because of you, Ohio is in play and we have a serious shot of flipping this seat and retaking a Senate majority.
**But the truth is, it’s only getting harder from here.**
Experts agree that Ohio is one of the most likely seats to flip this year, and it’s the key state in our path to Senate control. National Republicans have already poured a tsunami of outside resources into Ohio to attack me and my record – and I can guarantee they’re about to unleash a new wave of attacks.
I’ll have more to say soon, but in the meantime, I have to candidly ask for your support. We’re entering a brand new phase of this race, and I need you by my side.
**[Can I count on you to have my back by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Chris Pappas? Any donation will make a difference in this new phase of our race – no matter the amount.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260505_2.r05bMU&refcode=em20260505-2&t=2&akid=6481%2E582294%2ErJGZ8z)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260505_2.r05bMU&amount=5&refcode=em20260505-2&t=21&akid=6481%2E582294%2ErJGZ8z)**
Thanks,
Sherrod
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=22&akid=6481%2E582294%2ErJGZ8z)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=23&akid=6481%2E582294%2ErJGZ8z)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=6481%2E582294%2ErJGZ8z)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Katie Porter
subject: What I saw on the debate stage tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41278%2E3422442%2EgQqfdW)
Peter, I just stepped off the stage from the third debate in this race for governor, and I want to tell you what I saw up there tonight.
I saw **two MAGA Republicans** trying to drag Donald Trump’s extremist agenda into California.
I saw **a candidate who took a maximum contribution from Big Oil and is now backpedaling on single-payer health care** to win the support of powerful health care corporations and insiders.
I saw a **self-funding billionaire who has poured $158 million of his own money into this race** trying to buy himself a governor’s office.
That’s a lot of powerful people and special interests on one debate stage. _And the truth is Californians deserve better._
I’ve spent my career going after powerful interests that think the rules don’t apply to them—Big Banks, giant corporations, pharmaceutical companies, CEOs trying to rip off working people. And I don’t scare easily.
_I know what families are dealing with right now because I've lived it._
I know what it’s like to sit at the kitchen table and figure out which bills can wait another few days, or to stretch every dollar at the grocery store. I know the stress of trying to make everything fit when costs keep going up but paychecks don’t.
**That’s why I’m in this race: to lower costs, deliver single-payer health care, make child care free, make public college tuition-free, and make this state work for the people who actually do the work.**
And unlike some of the people I shared the stage with tonight, I’m not taking corporate PAC money and I’m not spending a personal fortune to buy this seat.
This campaign is powered by people giving what they can because they’re tired of politics working great for billionaires and corporations while everyone else gets squeezed.
The primary is coming up fast, and only two candidates move on to November. We need to keep reaching voters all across California if we’re going to make it through.
**[If you’re with me, I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can today to help us reach more voters, and make sure we earn a spot on November’s ballot.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260505_3_ak.ghTxzi&refcode=em20260505-41278&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41278%2E3422442%2EgQqfdW)**

Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260505-41278&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=41278_3422442_gQqfdW&akid=41278%2E3422442%2EgQqfdW)**

clean_body: Peter, I just stepped off the stage from the third debate in this race for governor, and I want to tell you what I saw up there tonight. I saw two MAGA Republicans trying to drag Donald Trump’s extremist agenda into California. I saw a candidate who took a maximum contribution from Big Oil and is now backpedaling on single-payer health care to win the support of powerful health care corporations and insiders. I saw a self-funding billionaire who has poured $158 million of his own money into this race trying to buy himself a governor’s office. That’s a lot of powerful people and special interests on one debate stage. And the truth is Californians deserve better. I’ve spent my career going after powerful interests that think the rules don’t apply to them—Big Banks, giant corporations, pharmaceutical companies, CEOs trying to rip off working people. And I don’t scare easily. I know what families are dealing with right now because I've lived it. I know what it’s like to sit at the kitchen table and figure out which bills can wait another few days, or to stretch every dollar at the grocery store. I know the stress of trying to make everything fit when costs keep going up but paychecks don’t. That’s why I’m in this race: to lower costs, deliver single-payer health care, make child care free, make public college tuition-free, and make this state work for the people who actually do the work. And unlike some of the people I shared the stage with tonight, I’m not taking corporate PAC money and I’m not spending a personal fortune to buy this seat. This campaign is powered by people giving what they can because they’re tired of politics working great for billionaires and corporations while everyone else gets squeezed. The primary is coming up fast, and only two candidates move on to November. We need to keep reaching voters all across California if we’re going to make it through. Thank you, Katie Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: State Budget Passed by Legislature, Vetoed by Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=333b5f3f55&e=a7ab36849c)
| | | | | | 🏛️ State Budget Update: Legislative Action and Governor’s VetoYesterday, the State Senate approved a balanced state budget for Fiscal Year 2026 that focused on protecting core services while delivering targeted tax relief to help Arizona families, seniors, and small businesses manage rising costs. The legislature’s plan fully funded K–12 education, public safety, child protection services, and other essential state responsibilities. The tax relief package included measures such as reductions for working families, retirees, and small business employers—designed to improve affordability and support economic stability across the state. The budget relied on stable revenue projections.
The legislature’s budget protected essential services, prioritized responsible spending, and delivered meaningful tax relief without relying on federal reimbursements or voter‐dependent revenue mechanisms. The legislature’s plan also kept Arizona on solid financial footing while addressing affordability challenges facing families and small businesses. Today, Hobbs vetoed the budget bills. In her veto letter, she stated that she opposed the plan’s reductions to certain safety‐net programs and expressed concern that the Legislature’s revenue assumptions were, in her view, too uncertain to support long‐term fiscal stability. She also objected to the scope of the tax relief provisions mentioned above. As you can see, the legislature and the governor aren’t on the same page when it comes to this year’s state budget. She wants to include a Proposition 123 renewal and higher spending levels for Medicaid and other social service programs. When the governor walked away from budget negotiations in March, the House and Senate crafted a state budget that relied on delivering nearly $1.5 billion in tax relief over the next three years, including
* Elimination of state taxes on tips and overtime pay
* Expanded childcare expense relief
* Increased dependent tax credit
* Additional tax relief for retirees and pension income

The Legislature’s budget spent approximately $800 million less than the budget proposed by Hobbs. The $17.9 billion budget centered on major tax cuts delivering full conformity with federal tax reductions, 5% reductions to most state agencies, and improving affordability for Arizonans. Discussions on next steps continue between the House and Senate. Lawmakers will work to ensure the state has a stable, sustainable budget for the year ahead, but we have a divided government so the process is a bit messy.
🗳️**Campaign Update** Campaign signs will start going up over the next week. If you’d like to show your support for my candidacy, please request a yard sign [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=98af53b1a4&e=a7ab36849c).
Thank you for your continued support!Best,Shawnna
---
| | **P.S. Having a primary and a general election campaign isn’t cheap. I haven’t had a chance to hold any fundraisers or meet and greets this year due to our constant presence at the Capitol. Please consider making a financial donation to my campaign to keep our momentum going. If you would like to volunteer, **[**please contact me**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=607b4cb367&e=a7ab36849c)**.**

name: Danielle Bethell for Governor
subject: Announcing a BIG Endorsement…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Danielle Bethell PAC 20220 [Preferences](https://daniellebethell
body:
This one means a great deal to me.
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,I'm proud to share that Stand for Health Freedom has endorsed my campaign for Governor.**I 'm also proud to say that I am the only candidate in the Governor's race to receive this endorsement.**This one means a great deal to me.Stand for Health Freedom's endorsement is rooted in principles I share, medical freedom, informed consent, parental rights, religious liberty, privacy, and free speech. Their movement now includes more than one million advocates across the country, people who believe government should be accountable, respect individual liberty, and use common sense.[If you share those values, will you please consider making a donation today?](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-y/) We're two weeks from Election Day. My opponents have the money - either from big donors or personal loans - but we have the momentum and the grassroots. Can you help me close the gap before it's too late? [](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-j/) **My focus in this race is Oregon. If I 'm given the opportunity to serve as governor, I will use that office to make sure Oregonians are heard, served, and protected.** That also means being honest about how government uses data, where privacy is being weakened, and whether tools created in the name of safety are being used in ways that erode basic freedoms.**Long before this race, I was fighting against forced mandates and standing with families who believed government had gone too far in making decisions that belong to parents, patients, and individuals.** I fought against vaccine mandates in 2019 during HB 3063. I stood with communities, including the Russian Old Believer community, who understood deeply what religious and medical freedom mean when government starts narrowing people's choices.That work didn't begin because I was running for Governor. It began because I believed it was right.And I still do. [Can You Chip In Now?](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-t/) Oregonians deserve a Governor who understands that health decisions are personal. They deserve leadership that respects families, protects individual rights, and does not treat people as problems to be managed by the state.This endorsement is another sign of the momentum we are building heading into May 19.But endorsements alone do not win elections. We have to make sure voters hear this message before ballots are cast.[Please consider making a contribution today to help us keep reaching voters in these final weeks.](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-i/)I'm grateful for the support of Stand for Health Freedom, and I'm grateful to everyone who continues to stand with this campaign.Danielle Bethell
Republican for Governor**P.S.**[We are in the final stretch. If you believe Oregon needs a Governor who will stand up for medical freedom, parental rights, and individual liberty, please chip in today.](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-d/) [](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-h/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-k/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-x/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-m/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-c/) | [ Tweet ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-q/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-li-akjkyjy-hhlrhljhit-a/) | [ Forward ](https://daniellebethell.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-hhlrhljhit-E19159AE-akjkyjy-l-f)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tim=e2=80=99s_iPhone?=
subject: ALERT: SAVE AMERICA ACT STALLED IN THE SENATE
disclaimer_text: paid for by Friends of Tim Moore
body:
Peter, I need to be very direct with you.

The House passed the SAVE America Act to finally require voter ID and restore trust in our elections.

But right now, it’s STUCK in the Senate—and it’s being held up by a FILIBUSTER.

That means a small group of senators can BLOCK a BASIC, COMMON-SENSE reform most Americans already support: showing ID when you vote.

So here’s why I’m reaching out.

I’m personally collecting names of Americans who support the SAVE America Act and voter ID requirements to send straight to the Senate.

And I noticed something important—

your name isn’t on the list yet.

That needs to change TODAY! [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-tim-moore/050526_voterid_samoore/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=05.05.26_VoterID_SAMoore&utm_content=Link&recurring=true]

PASS THE SAVE ACT [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-tim-moore/050526_voterid_samoore/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=SA-Email&utm_campaign=05.05.26_VoterID_SAMoore&utm_content=Link&recurring=true]

clean_body: Peter, I need to be very direct with you. The House passed the SAVE America Act to finally require voter ID and restore trust in our elections. But right now, it’s STUCK in the Senate—and it’s being held up by a FILIBUSTER. That means a small group of senators can BLOCK a BASIC, COMMON-SENSE reform most Americans already support: showing ID when you vote. So here’s why I’m reaching out. I’m personally collecting names of Americans who support the SAVE America Act and voter ID requirements to send straight to the Senate. And I noticed something important— your name isn’t on the list yet. That needs to change TODAY! [] PASS THE SAVE ACT [] Because I’m submitting this petition at MIDNIGHT, and I want to show Washington exactly how many Americans are demanding free and fair elections backed by voter ID. Not next week. Not after more delay. NOW. So I’m asking you directly: [] SIGN THE VOTER ID PETITION: PROTECT FREE AND FAIR ELECTIONS [] Add your name and stand with us to secure our elections before it’s too late. [] If we don’t apply pressure, this bill DIES quietly in the Senate—and NOTHING changes. I’m not going to let that happen without a fight. Sign by midnight. — Congressman Tim Moore (NC-14) Sent from my iPhone This email was paid for by Friends of Tim Moore PO BOX 97275 RALEIGH, NC 27624

You can [see images of his invention here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAURp_G7m6EsSG4oNjGXbbd0sJwbW4WgwUkkd9-lBlNO83UR9-Pzr_bfDMUKG5_zY66rmmO-CoBa8U8OzQunDY_qGDxdOT0qChlqTNnXAITwOTsDIVzHlqnV0SOfYu6u14Vk92oVOv1IvginOLDMMpB9suiBqsEl3bFrudj35J-tzHBZMeY5OrCu35chBrd2I-LNaIZGDqqKV_uiWL1uIYzPTFfbNrboH2tR2n6Pw2fGj4dpmKsZ9rojRs-VU8FnDmBInxB8FRqymfDpxRhNydI6JTo4J58hC3lTAgZLdITHZjv1JoymAhkEXbzn-IGu7GeIsKPE23W7nhRCFTktRnYthsKn9frr3w_Nf8IAAD__zyAlkA). **BIG ANNOUNCEMENT** : Introducing _Flyover Updates_ A lot happens between this morning's edition of The Flyover and tomorrow mornings edition. This is the same trusted Flyover reporting you wake up to every morning--now available the moment it matters.

Because some days, you can't wait until tomorrow.

If you are like us, you don't want to miss breaking news. Today's sponsor, [Fisher Investments](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAQRb8GukTDgDEUFE-K0uW1W1rYjONZYWMZkih_v8r-wtb3nlOcr9twi5x5u_-PK4U2l2GjV83UGh1DopjyezoeXKkuvB_l0cja2gYEtCfoTmCHFDm_ByNTmImQtKSg-t6BVd45uQT0nR0TGIsG_TQaiLNXBEbNzig3WsnhY4MOrAKw6M6otB8755PXfpxiJwxQ4laO83fhrS0053d50nGeyipzWFrbq9D_BF4FXndax0ytbDNvcZs45s_ts-lrFPqiTA8C7ST0BZVDL9BWJfRFHiHtL86Zq-2Fgfsa-ReV7U9ZngF_AgAA__-zmXIM), is helping you plan your ideal retirement with a free guide designed to align your goals, timeline, and investment strategy for lasting financial confidence.
